author: Yinka Oluwole
review: TERRIBLE! let's just say if I'm able to get through this time and take my money out, gtbank won't be seeing any transaction from me for a very long time. The old app was working just fine, then someone decided to get fancy and mess it all up. Now I can't transfer nor make a simple purchase online. If there's anything lower than 1star, I would have rated this app, cos this is not it at all!

author: Aado Lifestyle
review: Ever since they did that massive migration and upgrade, everything feature in the app has become something else. Accounts are not displaying, transaction history is lagging, to the point that it says one does not have an actibe account. It is 2025, and I am using the desktop application and token to carryout transactions! The loading speed is horrible, you would definitely go run errands and come back and the application is still loading. As a big corporation this is a big SHAME!

author: AQ Bello
review: Horrible log in process, this new update forces you to use your phone number and the otp won't show up after several attempts, until you are barred and asked to wait for about an hour. Why isn't there an email or account bumbwr log in type. This has got to be one of the worst bank updates. Now several people won't have access to their funds because of an unsolicited and not fully thought out process.

author: Chi Chi
review: Awful app. Changed phones and downloaded the app. It's been 5 days now and I can't complete any transaction. App keeps saying the limit of 250k placed on my account will be removed after 48hours. It's 72 freaking hours. I can't even send ordinary 100k. What's up gtb??? This is so frustrating. I can't wait to return to naija and open another account with another bank. There's always a prob with gtb every now and then. One can't do a simple transaction in peace!

author: Laju Tuedor
review: Slower than a snail! Shows this message at login and for transfers after inputting password: "We are looking for your data, it might take a moment". Sometimes loads at login for over 30 mins! I use 2 fast & stable 5G networks. I know it's not a network issue on my phone cos other apps work well (including Netflix, which streams without buffering). Also, the option to login using biometrics has disappeared. At least with biometrics login, this annoying never-ending loading wasn't an issue.

author: Simon T
review: Requested for BVN , which I provided, and it says it was wrong, I called customer support to verify, and it was the same I had. I used the option of no BVN, and it says I should change my phone number. I have been on this issue more than a week before the app was finally released on July 31st. After the release, I thought it would be better, but all failed. Yet I can't register nor able to use the app

author: Miracle Ekpo
review: Gtb used to be one of my best banks until I started noticing issues with their app. I don't have a history of my transactions. I asked for account statement for Jan to Feb last year and I can't find it. The lack of accountability on the app is disheartening. I had to stop using it for major significant transactions. For a bank I really loved, it's painful. I will update this review if you work on the app.

author: A Google user
review: This app was efficient until recently. It throws alert at will. It takes forever to log in, after logging in, try to transfer and it says try again later. I thing there is a bug in this app. You guys might want to push a patch or something to fix this as soon as you can. One should be able to rely on GT World app. Its becoming frustrating. The last time this app was updated was October 2019. Please do something. Thanks for your hardwork.

author: Minister Osazee
review: If only I could drop a 0 star rating for this new updated app! The interface is so confusing and tiring to navigate! My account was placed on limit and my correct card details have been declined! Customer support not responding to chats, the call process is tiring and the call rate to customer care is ridiculously high! I'm at a fix and it's tiring! GT bank, please do better!!

author: Abubakar Aliyu
review: The most recent update has broken the app again: 1. When I minimize the app to generate software token, I have to re-login again and initiate the transaction from the beginning! In fact you have to re-login and start over again once the app is minimised. 2. The app crashes when I try to share the receipt after a transaction. I have to re-login, go to transactions and send from there.

author: azeez
review: I've been a customer for 9years, and my experience so far as been good, but there's always room for improvement. Make it possible to delete remove details of choice from the list of saved beneficiaries. There are some account details I'd like to remove from my list of beneficiaries but can't, which makes no sense. This improvement will be a good one.

author: Dae Xavier
review: The app has improved greatly in areas like performance and interface experience compared to a couple of weeks ago, when I just started using it. but what I still find discouraging is the frequent disappearance of my transaction history. I think the developers should look into it. Nobody wants to make transactions frequently only to come back and find out that there's no record of it.

author: Akin Smith
review: New problem. When I'm attempting a transfer, and I switch to the token app to obtain a code, the bank app crashes! In fact, if I switch to any other app, the same thing happens. This wasn't a problem in the past. Android system reports that the app is crashing frequently and should be put to sleep.

author: Okechi Osondu
review: I've been unable to purchase Airtime on the app for a few months now despite the updates. After putting in the 6-digit code from the soft token, the app will always say "Airtime purchase ID is not found or has been used". I have to use the internet banking to purchase Airtime. Please fix this. Thank you.

author: Abashay Dan Audu
review: I've become utterly angry about the fact that the App has turned out to be useless. I can't access my account, it keeps saying something went wrong ever since I reinstalled it. I'm thinking of deleting it and move my money elsewhere. Bottom line is that, the App has stopped being user friendly.

author: Temitope Akinlemibola
review: very bad experience. I can't find my transaction later than a month. of which I might want to resend the receipt. the recent update is quite bad because when I receive money, it will show in transaction history but will not reflect on the balance.

author: George Aneke C.
review: I really find it difficult to understand why it's this difficult for a big bank like GT to fix the bugs on this App. First, I login and to navigate to any transaction phase, it automatically logs me out. I will have to login like 5 times before I could make just 1 transaction, this is insane. secondly, initially I'm able to load all my previous transaction records, up to 6 months, search for particular transactions based on keywords over up to one year, but now, these features are just lost.

author: Marvellous Horsfall
review: Good work so far. Here are some recommendations for the app. In the Transaction History section, please let's have more filters to use to view the transactions. Right now there are only time/duration filters. You'd make this app superb by including other such filters as Credit or Debit only, filter by particular receiver or sender etc. Products on the app lead back to website or e-banking. These should be accessed and processes fully from the app.

author: Doctor 2fingers
review: This new update is so annoying. it doesn't allow for use of e-token. the moment you switch between it an e- token app, it logs off. I wish I hadn't updated to it. If there is anything like minus 5 star 🌟, that's what it deserves.

author: Tobechukwu Ezenachukwu
review: It is now difficult using the recent update of this app with the etoken app. You are automatically logged out by the time you navigate away from this app to the etoken app to get a token, which is required to complete a bank transfer; this is a very frustrating experience. Kindly fix up in subsequent update and I'll update my rating.

author: Ikemeh David
review: sorry, I'm having issues with the app... (BEEN!, rather) I'm using galaxy note 10+ and I have for the past 9 time Uninstalled and reinstall the app to my phone. still not working. it opens and does nothing 😌, just the GT LOGO on the front without booting up or loading up properly. it would stay on that same screen for 15 to 20 minutes with no query or shutting down by itself. please HELP. HELP. HELP.

author: Oyewole Oni
review: Didn't you guys know that we need to enter OTP from another app. Hence the session keeps timing out and goes to the home page. You guys can't even maintain state in the app.... Tell your testers to test properly before any release. The last build was good. This recent one is a flop... please revert

author: Victor Amajatoja
review: the App shut down when I switch to generate my etoken to complete a transaction. very poor I am unable to complete a transaction because whenever I generate the etoken and I switch back it restart and the cycle continues. the app and the token app are in same phone. this is so frustrating really don't know how to proceed.

author: Chukwunwike Ebuka Okeke
review: the new recent update that occurred yesterday is messing things up here. Imagine trying to do a transfer, after inputting the person's details and you minimise the app to get your otp from gtbank token coming back to the app, it will lock you out and reset again while the token is still counting that's messed up nah. Please, you guys should fix this bug asap. thank

author: Elizabeth Quadri
review: I experience network delays once in awhile, that does not get resolved quickly. At such moment, I opt for another bank app. I will appreciate it if the network issues are quickly resolved. Secondly, the privilege to deal with account officers or lodge complaints easily online would be highly appreciated. Method of Transaction history in also not clearly stated, which makes it cumbersome. It should be seen at a glance.

author: Oluchukwu Okocha
review: Until today - Feb 2026, I still prefer the old GTB app. I don't understand why I have a banking app but I always have to login to the Internet banking platform just to view my transaction history. Is it so difficult for your developers to make the transaction history feature reliable? It's been like this for almost a year. Everytime there is an update to the app I hope it will be fixed but that has not happened till today.

author: HENRY DATUBO
review: After changing my mobile phone to Redmi Note 14 Pro + and updating the app, I started noticing bugs and was unable to use biometric again. It's really frustrating now cuz after my phone system upgrade, I can't use the app any longer as I'm unable to login.

author: Chidozie Friday Hanson
review: There are several reasons why fintech Banks are taking over commercial banking space because they listen and they test their applications frequently for any bug. kindly fix your app and read through users complaints. I am barely two months old with GTB, seriously the unnecessary debit is really abnormal. I haven't seen support debit from Stanbic Bank and others I am using. what is going on GTB??

author: Michael Magaji Markus
review: Your service are very poor And that's why opay and Moniepoint remains the best I'll make sure I'm closing this account Because this isn't the first time I'm experiencing this, how can someone make transaction using your mobile app and will be debited but you won't credit the receivers account, this is deliberate and I'm so disappointed, this isn't the Guaranty Trust we were used to 15 years back, s.ha*me-ful

author: Idoni Amahian
review: Card control toggle switch is not working. The error message "service temporarily unavailable" is always showing. this has been the case since 2025. Kindly look into this as customers won't be able to deactivate their cards inside of the app when faced with emergency.

author: Yusuf Sheriff
review: The app is now absolute garbage. Transaction history doesn't appear properly, lots of missing transactions. Features that were available in the older version before the rebuild and rebrand like nicknames for transfers are now missing. Horrible.

author: Chinedu Solomon (MasterMind)
review: My reason for 3 ⭐. Based on Loan Repayment I think someone should be able to clear his/her monthly Repayment earlier before the due date if capital is available. But On the APP you only have PARTIAL repayment which reduces the TOTAL SUM instead of the Monthly Repayment. Kindly make MONTHLY Repayment available,the PARTIAL repayment is also cool. Thanks

author: Elijah Ndiananie
review: I think I have just found the best bank,like opening account with my phone without going to bank to queue and the registration process went smoothly the interface is echo friendly and very easy to navigate just work on upgrading account without going to bank as well i love this app my #1

author: Jane Ann
review: it's an easy app but this evening money ( 5k ) was sent to my account and I got the credit alert, I logged in to the app but to my greatest surprise I only saw that 400 has been deducted for sms alert charge, I only have 4,600 left biko if nah play, make una stop am, which kin whying be this , ehh?

author: Delly Clement
review: it's a nice app,but I think there should be a page meant for customers to lodge complains or chat an online agent, unlike other bank app so it could ease going to the bank to lodge complain.please see to it.i have been trying to reach out to their customer service/account officer for ever a week now,but is to no avail.

author: Karen Chinelo
review: For a year, I had issues with using pin on my mobile app due to failed verification attempts because my phone camera was bad and it couldn't capture my face. I went to the bank like 7 months ago, it still didn't work. I called customer care today and was helped by a lady. Thank you Gtbank. Finally!

author: Chinedu Obikili
review: the new update as at 29/04/2026 is misbehaving. Logging out to get details or token leads to being logged out completely and I'm unable to complete a single transaction. This needs to be fixed ASAP. The app is basically non-funtiomal right now

author: Tìmílẹ́hìn Délé-Dáramọ́lá
review: This version of this banking app lacks security. If one logs out and in a few minutes reopens it, the app will open without requiring password. It's not safe from Police or thieves. potential

author: Al-Moustapha
review: The app has improved significantly in terms of performance and interface experience compared to a couple of years ago, when the experience was horrible. I've always believed in the GTBank app in terms of security, but what I still find discouraging is the frequent small charges imposed on every cash transfer. If these charges can be moderated and more investment options are introduced, I will guarantee the app a 5-star but for now, I will give it 3 and a half.

author: Abraham Moses
review: After using the GTB POS and it's app I have seen that it was a total mistake All transactions made with the POS are not reflecting on the app and that currently means the money is missing It's very disappointing, honestly expected better

author: Ayishat Abiola
review: The updated version closes when I'm about to share the receipt. It displays a box with options to view app info or close the app. Will have to log in again to share the receipt .

author: Ogbonna Sunday
review: I like this app, very easy to use. Thanks GTBank for this new upgrade. Not like the previous one that keep demanding for debit card number before you can use it.

author: Kunle Awolowo
review: this upgrade has an issue. if I'm supposed to log into my token app to produce a token and every time I come back the gtworld app has timed out a d I have to log in again and start from the beginning...how can I complete a transaction

author: Remi Omolegbe
review: App keeps logging out after getting code from the new etoken. Logging back into gt app to do transfer a new code is required the cycle continues endlessly unless phone has split screen feature so 1 star

author: Alakwe Ifeoma
review: why is it difficult to make transfer on the newly updated GT app? i would have just continued using my old one, i upgraded and I'm in a mess right now. I cannot make a transfer.😭

author: John Oyediran
review: This app is so great, I love the user interface. It's user friendly and easy to use with fast and great results. Thank you GTBank.

author: Goldrich Richardson
review: this app is wonderful, it shows me the number I been looking for from other of my banks that they could not give me. I will continue now to bank and transacting with GTWORLD for this.

author: Daniel Idiaghe
review: This app became so horrible in so many ways. No transaction history, nothing is responding anymore, sometimes, I transfer between two of my GTB accounts, both registered on the app, and they don't work. My money is only God knows where. Please rectify these issues.

author: Hyelhirra Balami
review: I cannot carry out any transactions using the mobile since the 17th of December, the error message keeps saying "sorry it seems something went wrong, please try again". I don't understand why the app has theirs issue for this long. Previously use of the app with a similar message gets resolved after some hours or after reconnecting with the data provider but this problem has persisted for over two weeks without a resolution. I have uninstalled and reinstalled the app without any difference.

author: Samuel Silas Dagusa
review: I have installed and Uninstalled more than 3 times. most times, after a day or two, it freezes and doesn't open again. what could be the reason ? are there phones that are not compatible with the app? cos I use a Samsung galaxy s10.

author: Martins Okpegboro
review: 1. Please make the app such that you can log in to your multiple devices at the same time. sometimes I need to do a transaction with the device I currently have with me. but since it's not possible to be logged in on multiple devices I start going to look for the particular device I'm logged in. 2. Make the app such that when you input an account number and you put the wrong bank (out of error), the transaction should decline VERY IMPORTANT!!!

author: John Oluwafemi popoola
review: Though I have issue with transactions, it always asks about my token, which is very frustrating after doing all the necessary thing, but i taught the app is superb, not untill I downloaded it I found out that it not working over here. It has make me waste and spend unnecessarily, just because i trust the app will work, leaving my ATM card at home. I'm only keeping it because I don't want to waste the data I used in downloading it.

author: Grace Chiamaka Maxwell
review: The app has been working well so far. Please try to work on the quick credit process. It keeps saying a pending request is on, but no disbursement ever happens. Please work on it.

author: udoh Mike
review: GTBank is a bank that extract money from customer account by force by fire. they charge monthly depends on your transactions. Details below: Monthly fee: 350-1000 for maintenance Sms alert fee: 20-300 depends on transaction. Transfer fee (Stamp): depends on how much you transfer. Zero naira balance: (example: - 350. in your account, ones you receive money, automatically the machine will deduct the funds. Zero interest rate even when you keep money in your account without touching.

author: Sunday John Enyinnaya
review: the most useless app ever in the world right now... this bank was my favorite bank before, before then change the old mobile app everything became worst, who's ever that Introduce this app most be mad, my question is what happens to the old app very easy to use no issues, now I can't even make a transfer even to open the stupid App

author: Rota Sunday
review: It would be great to be able to generate statements of account and send as PDF via email whenever it is needed. Other bank apps have this feature but the Gtbank app is yet to implement it. Kindly look into this!

author: Charles Onwuasoanya
review: This app keeps rerouting to Playstore for fresh download. This morning alone, every completed download is lost only to restart over and over for four consecutive times now leading to a loss of about 130MB. This is a very unpleasant experience and should be fixed. Besides, it has been a regular occurrence except that today it rerouted for fresh download four consecutive times and maybe still counting.... Customer care said it's my phone, I wonder why other apps do not have the same issue.

author: Earl Nairobi
review: The App needs to be futuristic just like palm pay dashboard , it needs more design to make it looks like Kuda . but kudos thou. just try and work on aesthetics of the App. because the Dashboard is too local like other Traditional Banks.

author: Keshinro Covenant
review: very very useless bank and unsatisfied, for every credit and debit alart, they will charge me #50 even if I make just #100 transactions they will still deduct that #50 as if that's not enough, every months they will still charge me #450 for monthly charges I'm a student and other student like me in my institution complain about these as well but no changes guess what we will close down our account with you people and focus on online banks alone 😡🤬🤬

author: Anita Udah
review: I can't even see my home page...it's totally blank and the complaint I've been making are not used to help me solve the problem ....The former apps were better, I suggest you take down this app totally, cos it's not usable and totally ineffective. In one word ..this app is "USELESS"
